title: Rasjid Chan
text: Home * People * Rasjid Chan Rasjid Chan , [1] a Singaporean chess programmer with passion for bit-twiddling and bitboards [2] . Rasjid is author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible chess programs SnailChess [3] and Cowrie Chess [4] .
